item.title: Kansas Star Darryn Peterson Is 'Getting Terrible Advice' Amid Cramping Saga
item.description: The saga surrounding Kansas star Darryn Peterson, arguably the nation's best men's college basketball player, continues.

item.title: World Cup Watch: MLS Will Be Where USA's Goalkeeper Battle Will Play Out
item.description: The two top candidates to be the man in the net for the USA at the World Cup will duke it out in MLS.

item.title: MLB Spring Training Buzz: Brewers, Murphy Agree To New Three-Year Deal
item.description: Notable news, notes and buzz with MLB spring training ramping up ahead of the World Baseball Classic and Opening Day.

item.title: Francisco Lindor Responds To Steve Cohen's Comments On Mets Captaincy: 'I Respect It'
item.description: Francisco Lindor says he respects the declaration this week by New York Mets owner Steve Cohen that there will never be a captain as long as he owns t...

item.title: Bears' Caleb Williams Might Be NFL's Best QB In 2026, Says Colin Cowherd
item.description: Caleb Williams proved he could quarterback in 2025, but Colin Cowherd thinks he can take a step forward in 2026.
